form.label: Traffic by Protocol and Port Metrics

search.query: | mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 | `set_span`

| mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 exp_ip=$exp_ip$ nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" $span_token$ BY nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_port dest_ip dest_host dest_port protocol | eventstats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol OUTPUT transport | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | eval app_port=if(((src_port<dest_port AND src_port!=0) OR dest_port==0),src_port,dest_port) | `format_port_column(app_port_string, app_port)`

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount sum(sum_flow_count) as Connections by nfo_hostname exp_ip sum_by_exp app_port_string | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name app_port_string "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename app_port_string as "Application Port" | rename pct as "% of Total"

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: | mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 exp_ip=$exp_ip$ nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" $span_token$ BY nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_port dest_ip dest_host dest_port protocol | eventstats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol OUTPUT transport | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | eval app_port=if(((src_port<dest_port AND src_port!=0) OR dest_port==0),src_port,dest_port) | `format_port_column(app_port_string, app_port)` | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount sum(sum_flow_count) as Connections by nfo_hostname exp_ip sum_by_exp app_port_string | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name app_port_string "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename app_port_string as "Application Port" | rename pct as "% of Total"

table.title: Traffic for Application Port and Protocol for $submitted:Application Port$ reported by NFO:$NFO$ Device:$submitted:Device$

search.query: | search exp_ip="$Exp_IP$" nfo_hostname="$NFO$" app_port_string="$Application Port$" | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount sum(sum_flow_count) as Connections by src_ip dest_ip src_host dest_host src_port dest_port transport exp_ip sum_by_exp | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | `format_port_column(src_port_string, src_port)` | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, dest_port)` | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections, 0)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, PacketsAmount, 0)` | table src_ip src_host src_port_string dest_ip dest_host dest_port_string "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" src_host as "Source Host" src_port_string as "Source Port" | rename dest_ip as "Destination IP" dest_host as "Destination Host" dest_port_string as "Destination Port"

| mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 nfo_hostname="$NFO$" exp_ip="$Exp_IP$" src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" BY nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_port dest_ip dest_host dest_port protocol | eventstats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | search (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol OUTPUT transport | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | eval app_port=if(((src_port<dest_port AND src_port!=0) OR dest_port==0),src_port,dest_port) | `format_port_column(app_port_string, app_port)` | search app_port_string="$Application Port$" | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount sum(sum_flow_count) as Connections by src_ip dest_ip src_host dest_host src_port dest_port transport exp_ip sum_by_exp | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | `format_port_column(src_port_string, src_port)` | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, dest_port)` | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections, 0)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, PacketsAmount, 0)` | table src_ip src_host src_port_string dest_ip dest_host dest_port_string "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" src_host as "Source Host" src_port_string as "Source Port" | rename dest_ip as "Destination IP" dest_host as "Destination Host" dest_port_string as "Destination Port"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the receiving of metrics data is not configured. For more information, please see the Metrics index section of the App Setup and TA Setup dashboards.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10067: Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20067). This Module identifies hosts with the most traffic. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO “Network Traffic and Devices Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
